hero_subtitle: SFTY gives banking leaders a unified compliance operating view that consolidates audit-ready evidence and regulatory rule updates to streamline digital asset due diligence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Bank due diligence lacks strategic visibility
problem_description: Executives face challenges gaining a clear operating view across fragmented compliance workflows. This limits timely oversight of risk, audit readiness, and consistent oversight of digital asset-related exposures in banking environments.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects compliance workflows, provider outputs, case evidence and regulatory rule updates into a single operating layer that delivers audit-ready visibility for bank executive risk control.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to risk decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects compliance check results through risk review, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support audit-ready bank due diligence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides bank executives with a provider-neutral compliance layer that connects risk data, decisions, and audit-ready evidence for comprehensive due diligence oversight.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides banks with a controlled compliance layer that preserves audit-ready evidence and enables scalable workflows for effective bank due diligence oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support executive oversight of bank due diligence
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows improve bank due diligence visibility
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports regulatory inspections for banks
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects provider outputs for risk control
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for bank executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY offers bank executives a connected compliance operating view, enhancing risk control, audit readiness, and visibility across digital asset workflows and regulatory rule monitoring.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support bank due diligence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports due diligence by connecting customer, wallet, transaction, and regulatory data into structured cases and evidence packages tailored for banking oversight requirements.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence with detailed audit trails to assist banks in regulatory inspections and internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates provider outputs into one workflow layer without disrupting existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening systems used by banks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing compliance providers, organizing their outputs into workflows, cases and reports without replacing established tools.
final_title: Review bank due diligence controls with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY structures audit-ready evidence and regulatory updates into one connected compliance operating view.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
